subcodes.first_line: We have heard thy mention and have remembered thee in this wondrous Tablet, and counsel thee to manifest supreme steadfastness in this Cause [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ذکرک ذکرناک بهذا اللوح البدیع و نوصیک بالاستقامه الکبری علی هذا الامر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
